reason: Fresh-process verification showed that QPY byte SHA-256 is not a canonical identity for equal Qiskit control-flow circuits. The logical commitment is being migrated to a normalized OpenQASM 3 digest; QPY hashes remain execution-artifact receipts only.
replacement_policy: Do not modify or submit this seal. Generate a fresh production-random v2 catalog after the stable logical-circuit digest migration passes cross-process tests.
